title: croton angolensis
intro: Croton angolensis, also known as the Croton tree or African Bloodwood, is a tropical tree native to Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton angolensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and insect bites. Herbal preparations of Croton angolensis include a decoction made by boiling the bark or leaves in water, which can be used topically or taken orally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
